# Stay ahead of evolving   threats with CyberSec1st

CyberSec1st provides tailored, vendor-agnostic cyber security advisory services to safeguard your business. From mitigating legacy vulnerabilities to preparing for future threats, we ensure your security is built to last.

[LEARN MORE](https://cybersec1st.com/services/)

[CONNECT WITH US](https://cybersec1st.com/contact/)

![](https://cybersec1st.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Shield-3-1.svg)

## Your trusted partner in cybersecurity assurance

At CyberSec1st, we go beyond just meeting compliance standards — we help you turn cybersecurity into a competitive advantage.

As a trusted and independent cybersecurity assurance provider, we work with organizations of all sizes to build confidence in their digital infrastructure. From aligning with industry frameworks to securing everyday operations, our team ensures your business is not only protected but prepared for the future.

Years of Experience

8+

Satisfied customers

43%

Countries

3

## Services we offer

## Cybersecurity Risk & Resilience

We help organisations identify, assess, and mitigate cyber risks through detailed risk assessments, threat modelling, and business impact analysis, followed by actionable treatment plans and comprehensive resilience programs.

## Cybersecurity Strategy & Frameworks

Our team develops and aligns cybersecurity strategies with your business objectives, using industry-recognised frameworks such as ISO 27001, NIST CSF, Essential Eight, and ISM to ensure robust compliance and maturity.

## Cybersecurity Governance & Compliance

We design and implement cybersecurity policies, conduct internal audits, and provide compliance advisory services. Our support helps you meet ISO certification requirements and navigate evolving regulatory landscapes with ease.

## Cybersecurity Operations

We strengthen your security posture through secure architecture design, secure development lifecycle practices, and robust incident response planning. We also assess and enhance third-party risk and operational security maturity.

[LEARN MORE](https://cybersec1st.com/services/)

## Who We Serve

![](https://cybersec1st.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Public.jpg)

## Public & Private Sector Leaders

CyberSec1st secures **public institutions** and **private enterprises** with tailored, **ISO-aligned strategies** that ensure compliance, reduce risk, and enable secure growth.

![](https://cybersec1st.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Government.jpg)

## Government & Defence

Supporting national security with **defence-grade cybersecurity frameworks,** risk assessments, and compliance with Australian Government Information Security Manual (ISM) standards.

![](https://cybersec1st.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Healthcare.jpg)

## Healthcare & Education

Securing sensitive personal and patient data, safeguarding online learning platforms, and enabling continuity through **healthcare cybersecurity** and **education sector compliance.**

![](https://cybersec1st.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Infra.jpg)

## Critical Infrastructure & Utility

Enhancing cyber resilience across essential services with **critical infrastructure protection**, threat modeling, and **risk management strategies** aligned with government directives.

[LEARN MORE](https://cybersec1st.com/industries/)

## What our clients say

CyberSec1st’s Day 0–2 strategy

secured our systems and prepared us

for AI-driven threats.

IT Implementation Manager, Multinational Retail Group

CyberSec1st helped us navigate a critical

compliance transition. Their knowledge and

professionalism made the difference.

CISO, Government Department

CyberSec1st delivered a quantum-ready

cyber roadmap, aligned with our

business growth and board priorities.

CEO, Private Sector Company

data.summary: CyberSec1st offers tailored cybersecurity advisory services aimed at protecting businesses from evolving threats. The company focuses on comprehensive risk assessment, compliance with industry standards, and strengthening cybersecurity frameworks. Its services include risk and resilience management, strategic alignment with business goals, governance compliance, and operational security enhancement. They serve various sectors, including public institutions, healthcare, education, and critical infrastructure, ensuring secure growth and compliance with regulations. With over 8 years of experience and a global presence, CyberSec1st emphasizes turning cybersecurity into a competitive advantage for its clients.
